free_text: Scattering of 18.7 MeV alpha particles from Al, Cu, and
essentially of a thin proportional (dE/dx) counter and
counter contains a mixture of CH4 and either argon or
helium at atmospheric pressure, under continuous flow.
Four different scattering foils were positioned in a
"foil ladder" at the center of the chamber. Foils of
Al, Cu, Ag, and Au with a nominal thickness of 0.0001
inch were used. The Au foil was included for alignment
The groups from transitions to the first two excited
Natural isotopic composition consisting of Cu-63 and
Cu-65 was considered. The 3 and 4 levels of Cu-63 and
the 3 level of Cu-65 could not be resolved.
